BTD.Fields.align.label: Text Alignment
BTD.Fields.wrap.label: Word Wrap
BTD.Fields.wrap.hint: Wrap long text to the drawing's width. The text box above also accepts manual line breaks.
BTD.Fields.strokeWidth.label: Text Stroke Width
BTD.Fields.strokeWidth.hint: Outline thickness around the text, in pixels. Leave blank or 0 to use the default.
BTD.Fields.strokeColor.label: Text Stroke Color
BTD.Fields.strokeColor.hint: Color of the text outline. Only applied when a stroke width is set.
BTD.Settings.defaultTextAlign.name: Default Text Alignment
BTD.Settings.defaultTextAlign.hint: Alignment applied to text drawings that do not set their own. 'Foundry default' leaves core behavior untouched.
BTD.Settings.defaultWordWrap.name: Default Word Wrap
BTD.Settings.defaultWordWrap.hint: Word-wrap behavior applied to text drawings that do not set their own. 'Foundry default' leaves core behavior untouched.
BTD.Settings.defaultStrokeWidth.name: Default Text Stroke Width
BTD.Settings.defaultStrokeWidth.hint: Outline thickness (px) used for text drawings that do not set their own. 0 disables the global default.
BTD.Settings.defaultStrokeColor.name: Default Text Stroke Color
BTD.Settings.defaultStrokeColor.hint: Outline color used together with the default text stroke width.
